versions.command: .venv/bin/locma depot publish e36s22 runs/e36_s22_gen0.zip runs/e36_s22_gen1.zip runs/e36_s22_gen2.zip runs/e36_s22_gen3.zip runs/e36_s22_gen4.zip runs/e36_s22_gen5.zip runs/e36_s22_gen6.zip runs/e36_s22_gen7.zip runs/e36_s22/history.json runs/e36_s22/train.log runs/e36_s22/gate.json runs/e36_s22/gate.log --kind model --parent e29slim@1 --note E36 PFSP third seed chain (s22), M1 Max/CPU, seed 22M, n_envs 12, 1.5M steps/gen, gen0-7 — identical regime to e36m1, differs ONLY in seed (isolates seed variance). Gate: anchor 0.8125 exact 3rd repro, s22_gen4 0.520, s22_gen7 0.4975 (CI straddles 0.50). Completes the 3-seed promotion-bar item: pooled endpoint 0.509 [.481,.537] across x86 14M / m1 20M / s22 22M. Confirmation evidence for the promoted depot:e36 gen7, not a candidate itself. --meta {"seed": 22000000, "n_envs": 12, "platform": "m1-cpu", "steps_per_gen": 1500000, "generations": 8, "internal_h2h": [0.61, 0.61, 0.52, 0.585, 0.54, 0.485, 0.54, 0.525], "gate": {"anchor_e29slim": 0.8125, "s22_gen4": 0.52, "s22_gen7": 0.4975}, "pooled_3seed_endpoint": 0.5092}
versions.note: E36 PFSP third seed chain (s22), M1 Max/CPU, seed 22M, n_envs 12, 1.5M steps/gen, gen0-7 — identical regime to e36m1, differs ONLY in seed (isolates seed variance). Gate: anchor 0.8125 exact 3rd repro, s22_gen4 0.520, s22_gen7 0.4975 (CI straddles 0.50). Completes the 3-seed promotion-bar item: pooled endpoint 0.509 [.481,.537] across x86 14M / m1 20M / s22 22M.
